name: Dynasty - QA/Audit Agent: Daily System Integrity

parameters.subject: QA AUDIT ALERT — System Integrity: {{$json.system_integrity_score}}%

parameters.name: fields
parameters.value: ={{JSON.stringify({date: $json.date, checks_run: $json.checks_run, checks_passed: $json.checks_passed, checks_failed: $json.checks_failed, anomalies_found: $json.anomalies_found, auto_fixed_count: $json.auto_fixable_count, escalated_count: $json.needs_alert ? 1 : 0, system_integrity_score: $json.system_integrity_score, run_duration_seconds: $json.run_duration_seconds})}}
